description: Note from Shelomo b. Eliyyahu to Abū l-Bahāʾ. He sends payment of 3.5 (probably dirhams) for sugar and orders mūminī(??).  This may be the 3.5 still owed according to T-S AS 145.77. On verso there is a note in Arabic script ("white sugar, 10 raṭls") and underneath a Greek/Coptic numeral. (Information in part from Goitein’s index card.)
description_he: שטר אשראי או קבלה ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
